subject: Last chance (3 hrs left)
body:
You have less than 3 hrs to grab your 200 copies of $100M Money Models PLUS all the bonuses FREE.

ALL BONUSES DISAPPEAR IN LESS THAN 180 MINUTES.

You don't have time to watch the full presentation, so here's what you get FOR FREE when you support our mission by buying 200 copies for other people:

First you'll get...

ACQ Implementation Virtual Workshop led entirely by me based on the exact workshop we do in-person for $35,000 - I will personally take you through my...

- Proprietary ACQ Deconstraining Process where I guide you through our entire deconstraining process to help you laser-focus on THE thing holding your business back.

- Find & Create Leverage by identifying exact constraints and my highest-leverage frameworks for each one to help you get maximum returns on your effort.

- Crystal Clear Personalized Implementation Plan showing you THE constraint to annihilate and my best tactics for doing it to get the most 10x leverage growth you can.

Second you'll get...

12 ACQ Playbooks - my most detailed deep dive into all the profit-boosting business concepts we cover in the virtual events. Immediately available now.

- Closing Handbook - (64 pages) of my favorite overcomes for each sales objection...that actually work.
- Proof Checklist - (32 pages) + a one-page checklist on how I weave in 14 proof elements into every offer.
- Retention Playbook - (42 pages) on the specific steps that we take to activate customers to keep them paying and kill your churn.
- Marketing Machine - (32 pages) on how to set up your business so that every customer creates enough media automatically that your business can market itself.
- Lifetime Value - (32 pages) on all the eight different ways that I look at increasing how much customers pay.
- Hooks Playbook - (30 pages) of my top creative hooks for organic, paid, and email. Don't test when you could use winners.
- Branding Playbook - (42 pages) - the quick and dirty how to build a brand playbook for entrepreneurs who need one fast.
- Price Raise Playbook - (32 pages) - the actual letters, emails, and scripts we use to raise prices on existing customers and keep them.
- Promo Cash Playbook - (36 pages) - these are the promos we use around the year to generate cash from our existing audience/list.
- GOATed Ads - (36 pages) - my paid ads process explained in gritty detail.
- Lead Nurture - (46 pages) - If you get more people to show up to sales events, you will sell more people. This is everything I know about increasing show up rates.

PLUS...EVEN MORE INSANE YOU ALSO GET FREE...

MY CUSTOM TRAINED ACQ AI integrating my entire life's work. With over $28,000,000 of real-world consulting, all my books, all twelve advanced playbooks, and my never-before-released writings to train a custom AI that...

- Finally Answers "What Would Alex Do In My Business?"
- Puts $28M of Real-World Consulting At Your Fingertips
- Your $135,000 Answer Fine-Tuned In An Instant
- Engineers Hyper-Relevant Solutions
- Like Having My ACQ Killers On-Call for you 24/7
- Grants Access To The "De-Classified" ACQ Data Vault.

But...these are all gone in less than 3 hours.

I rest my reputation on the quality of the products I put out. I stand by this. This is some of my best work. You will be happy you got them.

See you on the other side,

Alex

PS - Go here before the offer ends.

To be clear, no purchase will ever change how grateful I am to be on this ride with you. Thank you again.
